shortDescription: Spacious 1-bedroom condo in Church-Wellesley with open layout, balcony, and underground parking.
fullDescription: Welcome to 38 Grenville Street, Unit 905 in the vibrant Church-Wellesley neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The sleeping quarters comprise 1 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
